text:
your app doesn’t need 100 features.

it needs 1 killer feature that keeps users coming back.

i respect a great app, I’ll pay for the year if I find great value with it.

heck, i’ll forget to cancel willingly

take my money in 12 months 

BrainRot is a good example of that

App launched 2 days ago 
built in 48 hours

→ 219 downloads
→ $667 ARR
→ 86.3% paywall hit rate

All organic.
No ads.
No funding

→ 1 feature
→ 1 habit loop
→ 1 painful niche

We will begin real marketing soon 

→ Reddit posts + TikTok slideshows

App launched yesterday 
built in 48 hours

not even 24 hours gone by
money already in. 

when i have an idea 
48 hours later i have business

meanwhile you’re still opening 
an LLC after 30 days 

we don’t guess
like the majority do.

we execute

we know what works and we follow

no wonder your APP is stuck at $0/mrr

you are building apps ( nobody wanted)
I build habit loops disguised as apps 

last year, I collected sub $1M for a billionaire, 

I learned the secrets gate-kept
from you brokies

“confused prospects don’t buy”

stop confusing your users

Launched a Looksmaxing app 

2787 new users
73 conversions
92% hit the paywall
MMR climbing ￼

those were the numbers last night,
updated numbers below

3 post from our creators just went out.

Not VC-backed.
Marketing just starting
Just product + Apps store SEO

My plan?
